allow: Bash(docker compose --env-file ../.env exec api python -c "import alembic; print\(alembic.__version__\)")
Bash(docker compose --env-file ../.env run --rm --no-deps api python -c "import alembic; print\(alembic.__version__\)")
Bash(docker compose --env-file ../.env run --rm --no-deps --entrypoint /bin/bash api -c "pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -i alembic || echo ''NOT FOUND''; python -c ''import alembic'' 2>&1 || true")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm --entrypoint "" crypto-trading-bot/api:local pip list)
Bash(uv run --package api python -c "import alembic; print\(alembic.__version__\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH="apps;packages" .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import api; print\(''api OK''\); import alembic; print\(''alembic'', alembic.__version__\)")
